overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic flying vehicle on a high-rise rooftop landing pad. The camera emerges from a covered structure and circles the vehicle as its door opens and lights activate, set against a backdrop of towering skyscrapers in golden hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered rooftop entrance with glass ceiling

events.description: camera exits the covered structure onto the open rooftop helipad

agents.ego_description: moving forward from the interior covered area toward the open rooftop landing pad

entered.detail: dark metal and glass canopy covering the entrance area with geometric support beams
sleek black aerodyne vehicle with curved aerodynamic design parked on the landing pad
transparent safety barrier with metal frames along the edge of the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a modern glass and metal canopy on a high-rise rooftop. The camera moves forward toward a futuristic black flying vehicle parked on a landing pad, with the city skyline visible in the distance through the structure's open sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop landing pad with panoramic city views

events.description: exiting the covered structure into direct golden hour sunlight creating long shadows
vehicle's exterior LED light strips activate and begin glowing white along the edges

agents.ego_description: walking across the open rooftop toward the front of the parked vehicle

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass facades against the horizon
hexagonal platform with illuminated white edge markings where the vehicle rests
tropical palm tree in large planter on the rooftop edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered area into bright sunlight, the camera approaches the futuristic vehicle parked on the hexagonal landing pad. The vehicle's exterior lights activate as the camera moves closer, with towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees framing the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop helipad with vehicle staging area

events.description: vehicle's gull-wing door opens upward, revealing the illuminated interior cabin

agents.ego_description: circling clockwise around the vehicle to view its side and rear profiles

entered.detail: cylindrical industrial water tank on adjacent rooftop structure
raised roadway structure visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around to the side of the vehicle as its door opens upward in a gull-wing motion. Continuing around to the rear, the view showcases the vehicle's sleek design against the backdrop of the sprawling futuristic metropolis, with industrial structures and elevated highways visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that emerges from a sheltered rooftop structure into the expansive, sun-drenched skyline of a futuristic metropolis. It begins under a modern glass and metal canopy, gliding forward toward a sleek black flying vehicle parked on a landing pad. As the camera moves out from the cover into bright sunlight, the vehicle's exterior lights activate while towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees frame the horizon. The scene then shifts as the camera circles the craft, capturing the gull-wing door opening upward before continuing toward the rear. Finally, the view expands to showcase the vehicle's design against a sprawling backdrop of industrial structures and elevated highways stretching across the city.
